tasks.description: Unauthenticated GET /api/v1/public/history returned full XAIAuditLog rows (inputs_json, context, output_preview) for ALL users. Maintainer decision (a): keep an anonymized ticker. Done in bd1264d — projects to non-sensitive fields (timestamp/domain/model/latency) only; full per-user history now belongs behind auth (L1-T2). Regression test pins the projection.

No authn/authz anywhere; every enterprise route open + billable Gemini calls free to anyone. Done in 8d977a4 — require_user verifies a Supabase HS256 token (SUPABASE_JWT_SECRET) on hr/negotiation/risk (fail-closed → 503 until secret set, never open); public routes rate-limited (10/min/IP, in-memory). Tests: missing/bad/expired→401, unconfigured→503, POST /hr/scan w/o token→401, limiter→429. **PROD:** set SUPABASE_JWT_SECRET + send the token from the frontend, else protected routes 503.
Frontend build broken (TS1484, XAILog). Done in a1af217: import type → npm run build exits 0 (was exit 2).

Synchronous blocking Gemini calls inside async routes stalled the event loop. Done in dbfa775 — analyze_* are async + offload generate_content via run_in_executor; 4 callers await. Built scripts/probe_concurrency.py (the missing verify harness): with a 0.5s blocking fake client, 20/20 heartbeats complete during the block (max gap 11ms) — loop no longer stalled.
/quick-matrix cached now() resolved inside the cached fn → stale chart replay. Done in 07a2726: now() resolved in the outer route, cached helper keyed on the resolved instant; regression test added.

7 behaviour-bearing core calc modules had no tests. Maintainer decision (a/b): derive from canonical sources. Done in 2794cf7 — invariant + UNIVERSAL-law assertions (五行相生/相克, 六甲旬空 12-branch coverage, 12-stage totality, 24 solar terms strictly ordered, lunar round-trip, canonical Yang/Yin-Dun half). No fabricated school-specific values; timescale exercised indirectly.

XAI audit log on local SQLite is lost on Cloud Run recycle / not shared across instances. Maintainer decision: Supabase Postgres, start fresh. Done (92a2ed0 env-driven engine; bfedf2f URL coercion + drivers + tests; 9a9a94c SSL): the plain dashboard string works unchanged on both engines (async→+asyncpg, sync→psycopg2), SSL handled (asyncpg needs it explicitly), drivers added. **Verified against the live DB** — Supabase PostgreSQL 17.6, Singapore session pooler: write via sync path → dispose → read via fresh async engine → row present; the transient test table was dropped, prod left pristine. **Prod config (operational, same shape as T2):** set DATABASE_URL to the Supabase **pooler** string in Cloud Run to switch prod off ephemeral SQLite.
tasks.verify: KYMON_PG_TEST_URL='postgresql://postgres.<ref>:PW@aws-1-<region>.pooler.supabase.com:5432/postgres' .venv/bin/python -m pytest -q tests/test_db_persistence.py -k postgres (passed on the live DB)

metrics.delta: +28 audit tests (T1,T2,T4,T5,T6,T7); 1 gated skip = T7 live-Postgres

metrics.final: survives write→teardown→read on live Supabase PG 17.6
